creator.description: Information about the account, which has deployed the rollup to the blockchain

lastCommitment.description: The most recent cemented commitment hash

inboxLevel.description: Inbox level of the most recent cemented commitment

executedCommitments.description: Number of commitments that were cemented and executed

cementedCommitments.description: Number of commitments that were cemented (including executed ones)

refutedCommitments.description: Number of commitments that were refuted

orphanCommitments.description: Number of commitments that became orphan, due to their parent was refuted

smartRollupBonds.description: Amount of mutez locked as bonds

activeTokensCount.description: Number of account tokens with non-zero balances

tokenBalancesCount.description: Number of tokens the account ever had

tokenTransfersCount.description: Number of token transfers from/to the account

activeTicketsCount.description: Number of tickets the account owns.

ticketBalancesCount.description: Number of tickets the account ever owned.

ticketTransfersCount.description: Number of ticket transfers from/to the account.

numTransactions.description: Number of transaction operations related to the account

transferTicketCount.description: Number of transfer ticket operations related to the account

smartRollupCementCount.description: Number of `smart_rollup_cement` operations related to the account

smartRollupExecuteCount.description: Number of `smart_rollup_execute_outbox_message` operations related to the account

smartRollupOriginateCount.description: Number of `smart_rollup_originate` operations related to the account

smartRollupPublishCount.description: Number of `smart_rollup_publish` operations related to the account

smartRollupRecoverBondCount.description: Number of `smart_rollup_recover_bond` operations related to the account

smartRollupRefuteCount.description: Number of `smart_rollup_refute` operations related to the account

refutationGamesCount.description: Number of smart rollup refutation games related to the account

activeRefutationGamesCount.description: Number of active smart rollup refutation games related to the account

firstActivity.description: Block height at which the ghost contract appeared first time

firstActivityTime.description: Block datetime at which the ghost contract appeared first time (ISO 8601, e.g. `2020-02-20T02:40:57Z`)

lastActivity.description: Height of the block in which the ghost contract state was changed last time

lastActivityTime.description: Datetime of the block in which the ghost contract state was changed last time (ISO 8601, e.g. `2020-02-20T02:40:57Z`)
